## Acceptance criteria / 受入基準

- [ ] `uv run ruff check .` clean
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .` clean
- [ ] `uv run pytest -v` 全パス
- [ ] coverage >= 80% (Phase 1+)
- [ ] (Phase 5+) MCP Inspector スモーク確認
- [ ] (Phase 3+) RSS Feed Validator green
- [ ] (新規ソース追加時) ToS確認結果を記載
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md 更新
